fields.title: Footer: replace mutable lets with Refs, remove duplicated isSandboxConfigRequired
fields.description: footer.ts has 3 let variables (currentHygiene, currentTotalCost, currentSandboxConfig) that should be Refs. Also has a hand-written isSandboxConfigRequired that duplicates what Schema.is(SandboxConfigRequired) provides.
fields.close_reason: Replaced hand-written isSandboxConfigRequired (30 lines of manual validation) with Schema.is(SandboxConfigRequired). Mutable lets deferred — same as persistence, they are consumed synchronously from TUI render callbacks that can't be in Effect context.
